examples: The comparator circuit may develop offsets, causing it to trigger early or late.
If the comparator is used for sorting, that can mean the list isn't sorted correctly in the end.
Sorting with a comparator is one option when working with an enumerator, searching with a filter is the other.
The comparator must be the medicine least likely to cause heart problems among rival treatments.
Finally, the cost of adding the expensive comparator drug needs to be factored in.
